design_system.archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Modified for Medical Trust)
design_system.philosophy: Grounded, warm, inviting, trustworthy. Replaces cold clinical vibes with approachable, highly-legible, human-centric design.

buttons.primary: bg-sky-700 hover:bg-sky-600 text-white rounded-2xl px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-[1.02]
buttons.whatsapp: bg-[#25D366] hover:bg-[#1EBE5D] text-white rounded-2xl px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.outline: border-2 border-stone-200 hover:border-sky-700 text-stone-900 rounded-2xl px-8 py-4 font-semibold transition-all

cards.service: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-sm border border-stone-100 hover:shadow-md transition-all

sticky_mobile_cta.classes: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 p-4 bg-white border-t border-stone-200 flex gap-3 md:hidden z-[100] shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)]

page_sections.name: Header
page_sections.instructions: Sticky at top, z-50. Glassmorphism backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80. Left: Clinic Name/Logo. Right: Desktop Nav + 'Call Now' CTA. Mobile: Hamburger menu.

page_sections.name: Hero
page_sections.instructions: Split layout. Left side: High impact H1 'Your Smile, Our Priority', Trust subheadline, and side-by-side 'Call Now' & 'WhatsApp' CTAs. Right side: Overlapping cards—Main image is clinic_hero_bg, with a floating badge/card showing doctor_portrait and '15+ Years Exp' text.

page_sections.name: Doctor Profile
page_sections.instructions: Asymmetric bento grid. Image of Dr. Sharma taking up a tall column, with text taking up the adjacent column. Include bullet points of credentials (BDS, MDS, 15+ years experience).

page_sections.name: Services
page_sections.instructions: Grid layout (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3). Solid white cards on off-white bg. Use clear lucide-react icons or service_tools image for aesthetic enhancement.

page_sections.name: Testimonials
page_sections.instructions: Carousel or grid of patient reviews. Use star icons (text-amber-400). Round profile images. Focus on empathy and pain-free experiences.

page_sections.name: Appointment Booking / Contact
page_sections.instructions: Two-column layout. Left: Simple Shadcn form (Name, Phone, Date Picker, Service). Right: Contact details (Address, MapPin, Working Hours) + embedded Google Maps iframe.

page_sections.name: FAQ
page_sections.instructions: Use Shadcn Accordion. Keep it narrow (max-w-3xl) and centered for readability. Questions about insurance, pain, consultation fees.

clinic_hero_bg.description: Premium modern dental clinic reception area. Clean white and light teal colors. Soft warm sunlight.
clinic_hero_bg.usage: Hero section right-side background or visual.

doctor_portrait.description: High-quality professional portrait of Dr. Sharma in a clinic setting.
doctor_portrait.usage: Doctor Profile section and floating trust badge in Hero.

service_tools.description: Close-up macro shot of pristine dental tools on a medical tray.
service_tools.usage: Services section visual anchor or background texture.

patient_1.description: Happy older Indian man smiling warmly.

patient_2.description: A smiling patient with dark hair.

patient_3.description: A smiling woman at a dental clinic holding a dental tool.
patient_3.usage: Testimonials section avatar/image or secondary decorative image.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='call-cta-button', data-testid='whatsapp-sticky-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No full-screen gradients. Keep backgrounds solid and clean.
Ensure all text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit' for headings and 'Manrope' for body.
The Sticky Mobile CTA is mission-critical. It MUST be fixed at the bottom of the screen on mobile devices (md:hidden) with a high z-index and flex layout.
Do NOT use generic Shadcn cards everywhere. Mix flat shapes with subtle rounded corners.
Make sure forms use the Shadcn UI primitives but customized to match the spacing and rounding (xl) of the brand.
Include hover states (bg color change + text color change) on all interactive elements.
Do not use placeholder image URLs. Only use the images provided in the media section of this JSON.
